zh.Darlaston, Staffordshire, England: 英國斯塔福爾達盧亞斯頓
zh.Horton, Staffordshire, England: 英國英格蘭斯塔福爾霍頓
zh.Biddulph, Staffordshire, England: 英國斯塔福爾比度爾福
zh.Ormele, Thane: 義大利維圖特雷維索奧梅勒
zh.lifeSummary: 當Orme Gulden於大約1100年出生在丹麥時，他的父親Forester Richard d'Evereux67歲，母親Barfulf deWhitern31歲。他於1124年與Emma Beauchamp在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾結婚。他們至少是6個兒子的父母。他去世於1130年在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾享年31歲，埋葬在義大利維圖特雷維索奧梅勒。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Orme Gulden于大约1100年出生在丹麦时，他的父亲Forester Richard d'Evereux67岁，母亲Barfulf deWhitern31岁。他于1124年与Emma Beauchamp在英国英格兰斯塔福爾结婚。他们至少是6个儿子的父母。他去世于1130年在英国英格兰斯塔福爾享年31岁，埋葬在意大利維圖特雷維索奧梅勒。

nameMeanings.name: Gulden
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch and German (also Gülden): from gulden ‘golden’, derived from vergulden, vergolden ‘to gild’, a metonymic occupational name for a craftsman who gilds objects; compare Guldner .

Dutch: from gulden, the name of the coin (English guilder), applied as a topographic or habitational name referring to a house name such as In den silvren Gulden (‘In the Silver Guilder’), or from related verb meaning ‘to gild’, applied as a topographic or habitational name referring to a house name such as De Gulden Hoeve (‘The Gilded Farmhouse’) or De Gulden Zwaan (‘The Gilded Swan’).
Jewish (Ashkenazic): artificial name from German Gulden, Yiddish guldn, or Polish gulden ‘guilder’ (see 1 above).

variants.name: Guldin
meanings: Swiss German: probably a derivative of   Gold  . This surname is very rare in Switzerland.

variants.name: Gilden
meanings: Dutch: variant with an unrounded vowel of   Gulden  . Or a variant of   Gilde  .

variants.name: Guldner
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Guenter, Kurt.
German (also Güldner): occupational name for someone who worked in gold (for example a goldsmith, gilder, or jeweler), from Middle Low German, Middle High German gulden, gülden ‘to gild’.

variants.name: Guldan
meanings: Possibly an altered form of   Gulden  .

nameMeanings.name: Orme
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Midlands): from the Middle English personal name Orm (Old Norse Ormr, from ormr ‘snake’).

variants.name: Ormes
meanings: English: variant of Orme , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Oram
meanings: Biblical name, meaning ‘height’ in Hebrew, borne by a son of Shem and grandson of Noah mentioned in a genealogy (Genesis 10: 22).

variants.name: Ormiston
meanings: Scottish (southeastScotland): habitational name from any of the places called Ormiston, in the former counties of Roxburghshire and East Lothian, named with the genitive case of the Old Norse personal name Ormr (see Orme ) + Old English tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

variants.name: Orum
meanings: Danish (Ørum): habitational name from any of several places called Ørum, a compound of ør ‘gravel beach’ + hem ‘dwelling’. This surname is also found in Norway, where it is of Danish origin.
English (Wiltshire): variant of   Orme   and   Oram  .

en.lifeSummary: When Orme Gulden was born about 1100, in Denmark, his father, Forester Richard d'Evereux, was 67 and his mother, Barfulf deWhitern, was 31. He married Emma Beauchamp in 1124, in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons. He died in 1130, in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 31, and was buried in Ormelle, Treviso, Veneto, Italy.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Orme Gulden est né environ 1100, à Danemark, son père, Forester Richard d'Evereux, avait 67 ans et sa mère, Barfulf deWhitern, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Emma Beauchamp en 1124, à Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils. Il est décédé en 1130, à Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 31 ans, et a été enterré à Ormelle, Treviso, Veneto, Italie.

de.lifeSummary: Als Orme Gulden um 1100 in Dänemark geboren wurde, war sein Vater Forester Richard d'Evereux 67 und seine Mutter Barfulf deWhitern 31. Er hat 1124 in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom Emma Beauchamp geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne. Er starb 1130 im Alter von 31 Jahren in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Ormelle, Treviso, Veneto, Italien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Orme Gulden è nato il circa 1100 nel Danimarca, il suo padre, Forester Richard d'Evereux, aveva 67 anni e il suo madre, Barfulf deWhitern, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Emma Beauchamp nel 1124, nel Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli. Morì nel 1130, nel Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 31 anni, e fu sepolto a Ormelle, Treviso, Veneto, Italia.

ja.Ormele, Thane: イタリアベンエトートレヴィソオルメル
ja.lifeSummary: Orme Guldenが約1100年にデンマークで生まれた時，父Forester Richard d'Evereuxは67歳，母Barfulf deWhiternは31歳であった。1124年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアでEmma Beauchampと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子の親であった。彼は1130年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアで31歳で死去し，イタリアベンエトートレヴィソオルメルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Orme Gulden(이)가 대략 1100년 덴마크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Forester Richard d'Evereux(은)는 67세였고, 그의 어머니 Barfulf deWhitern(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1124년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르에서 Emma Beauchamp(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1130년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르에서 31세의 나이로 사망했으며 이탈리아 븐토 트레비소 오에 묻혔다.

mn.Horton, Staffordshire, England: Horton, Stæffordscīr, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Orme Gulden nasceu aproximadamente 1100, em Dinamarca, seu pai, Forester Richard d'Evereux, tinha 67 anos e sua mãe, Barfulf deWhitern, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Emma Beauchamp em 1124, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1130, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 31 anos, e foi sepultado em Ormelle, Treviso, Veneto, Itália.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Orme Gulden родился около 1100 г. в местности Дания, его отцу по имени Forester Richard d'Evereux было 67 лет, а матери, которую звали Barfulf deWhitern, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Emma Beauchamp в 1124 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей. Он умер в 1130 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 31 год и был похоронен в местности ормелл, тревисо, винето, Италия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Orme Gulden nació aproximadamente 1100, en Dinamarca, su papá, Forester Richard d'Evereux, tenía 67 años y su mamá, Barfulf deWhitern, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Emma Beauchamp en 1124, en Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos. Murió en 1130, en Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 31 años, y fue sepultado en Ormelle, Treviso, Veneto, Italia.
